Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Abikaliah Scarborough'S Responses To Specially Prepared Interrogatories (Set Two); Request For Sanctions;
Off Calendar Mar-09-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS SEAN MCELLIGOTT AND FIONNUALA MCELLIGOTT's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Abikaliah Scarborough's Responses To Specially Prepared Interrogatories (Set Two); Request For Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants' motion is GRANTED.

Plaintiff shall serve verified code-compliant responses without objections, including ones based on privilege or the protection of attorney work product, to the Defendants' Special Interrogatories (Set 2) by March 24, 2022. The term "code-compliant" means in compliance with the California Civil Discovery Act, Code of Civil Procedure sections 2016.010 et seq., as interpreted by the decisions of the courts of this state, including, without limitation, the case decisions cited in the Defendants' moving papers.

Defendants' request for monetary sanctions jointly against Plaintiff and Plaintiff's counsel of record is GRANTED in the amount of $439.00, which sum is due delivered to Defendants' counsel of record by April 7, 2022.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at pvestal@nvlawllp.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Vestal; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Abikaliah Scarborough'S Responses To Demand For Identification And Inspection Of Documents (Set Two); Request For Sanctions;

Defendants' request for monetary sanctions jointly against Plaintiff and Plaintiff's counsel of record is GRANTED in the amount of $439.00, which sum is due delivered to Defendants' counsel of record by April 7, 2022.
